basic_details.job_title: DSEO East Garo Hills Assistant Lecturer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Williamnagar Govt. Hr. Sec. School, Williamnagar and Rongrenggiri Govt. Higher Secondary School, Williamnagar.
basic_details.short_information: District School Education Office East Garo Hills (DSEO East Garo Hills) Assistant Lecturer Notification 2026 has been released on 26 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the DSEO East Garo Hills Assistant Lecturer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 32 years Age Relaxation: Upper age limit relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Master Degree in respective subject with B.Ed
qualification.details: Assistant Lecturer in Garo (MLL) (Day Shift): Master Degree in Garo with B.Ed Assistant Lecturer in English (Evening Shift): Master Degree in English with B.Ed Assistant Lecturer in English (Morning Shift): Master Degree in English with B.Ed Assistant Lecturer in Economics (Morning Shift): Master Degree in Economics with B.Ed Assistant Lecturer in History (Morning Shift): Master Degree in History with B.Ed

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DSEO East Garo Hills Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
